calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 664.6
Off Calendar Nov-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To CCP Section 664.6.

Plaintiff American Express National Bank's unopposed motion for entry of judgment pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure, section 664.6, is granted. Plaintiff shall submit a separate proposed order verbatim to the Court's ruling and a separate proposed Judgment.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
